LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BETTY J. HEDGEMAN'S "NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT; NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE." - DEFENDANTS DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED FACTS TO SUPPORT THE QUIET TITLE CLAIM. HYATT V. COLKINS (1917) 174 CAL.580, 581-582. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE POSSESSION AND EJECTMENT IS A REMEDY TO QUIET TITLE. SOUTH SHORE LAND CO. V. PETERSON (1964) 226 CAL.APP.2D 725, 741. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT BETTY J. HEDGEMAN'S "NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT; NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE."

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANTS DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF HAS PLED FACTS TO SUPPORT THE QUIET TITLE CLAIM. HYATT V. COLKINS (1917) 174 CAL.580, 581-582. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE POSSESSION AND EJECTMENT IS A REMEDY TO QUIET TITLE. SOUTH SHORE LAND CO. V. PETERSON (1964) 226 CAL.APP.2D 725, 741. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
